folder.name: Resources to explore and map your exchange experience
folder.intro:
Access here to the different resources to map your exchange experience, we have created a proposal from two different styles but you can adapt it to your tastes. Design your mapping proposal in your own style, it will be your own original project that seeks to make you aware of the softskills that are developed during your exchange. Beyond academics, the exchange develops skills, strategies, learning ... that later in your professional and academic development will be recognized and taken into account.

(Voice memo, Spanish)

Extra audio
